testsuite.name: testcases.LoginTests

testcase.name: TC05

failure.message: Error message incorrect expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message incorrect expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at testcases.LoginTests.TC05(LoginTests.java:98) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at testcase.name: TC06

failure.message: Logout tab is not displayed expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Logout tab is not displayed expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: TC01

failure.message: Welcome message not found in page content. Actual content: Welcome to Safe Railway With Safe Railway's service, you can: Look up train timetable to prepare for your trip Check for ticket price to find what suits your need Book your ticket online in a few easy steps And a lot more expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Welcome message not found in page content. Actual content: Welcome to Safe Railway With Safe Railway's service, you can: Look up train timetable to prepare for your trip Check for ticket price to find what suits your need Book your ticket online in a few easy steps And a lot more expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at testcases.LoginTests.TC01(LoginTests.java:29) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104) testcase.name: TC02

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form. ] but found [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form. ] but found [There was a problem testcase.name: TC03

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password. testcase.name: TC08

failure.message: User was able to login without activating the account! (Security activation bypass)

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: User was able to login without activating the account! (Security activation bypass) at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcases.LoginTests.TC08(LoginTests.java:146) at
